# date

**Instance Property**

The date object containing the time value.

## Declaration

```swift
var date: Date { get set }
```

## Discussion

You can make changes to this property until you hand off the timeline entry containing it to ClockKit. The value of this property must not be `nil`.

## Related Documentation

- **init(date:)**: Creates and returns a text provider for displaying the specified time.
- **init(date:timeZone:)**: Creates and returns a text provider for displaying the specified time.

## Getting the Time Information

- **timeZone**: The time zone used to format time values.
